system.description:
The character is of a more advanced age than seems normal for people who embark on adventures, and he begins the game already an adult, or even an elderly person, at least by medieval standards. If chosen, it grants 1 point for each 4 years or fraction thereof by which the character exceeds the age of 26.

The good news is that he gains 10 points to spend on skills for each year above 26; the bad news is that he has to make a roll on the Events Table of Chapter II (page 98) for each year, and take into account the rules for aging that begin to affect our character once he passes 35 years of age.

This bane is incompatible with the Green bane, and also requires the express permission of the Game Director.
